title: Modified beetle rearing medium
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3h5re","text":"1. 9~10 Glass tubes (20*3.5cm)with plug for only one side (opening of the other side )","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9sah3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"iztdx","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"eh3lp","text":"2. a bundle of tin foil","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8d729","text":"3. big plastic box for mixing the ingredients","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"image","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6456C3E8341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","height":217.66181818181843,"is_video":false,"legend":"{\"blocks\":null,\"entityMap\":null}","mime":"image/jpeg","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"167241.jpg","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/files/k4mxbv67f.jpg","shadow":false,"source":"https://content.protocols.io/files/k4mvbv67f.jpg","webp_placeholder":"https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/files/k4mwbv67f.webp","webp_source":"https://content.protocols.io/files/k4mubv67f.webp","width":163.32060027285155}}}}
steps: First, Add the dry ingredients A B 1 Chloramphenicol 0.47g 2 Wesson's salt 1.33g 3 Yeast 6.65g 4 Casein 6.65g 5 Starch 6.65g 6 Surcose 13.3g 7 Agar 26.6g 8 Liquidambar Sawdust 130g *The Sawdust need to be ground before using
Second, add the wet ingredients A B 1 wheat germ oil 2.5ml 2 95% ethanol 5ml 3 water 500ml(still need to be test) 4 a little bit too wet for adding 565ml of water
MIx all of the ingredients in the box and fill into the tube for 3/4 full (about 75ml)
Cut the tin foil into small pieces and fold it twice to cover the open side of the tube.
Autoclave the filled tube at 120°C for 20 min.
Use the stick to compress the ingredients inside the tube.
creator: 孟筠 陳
